allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Alexandre Amorim\\AppData\\Local\\Temp" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match "\\.\(jpg|jpeg|png|webp\)" -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-2\) } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-List)
